findings.message: Rendered vector stroke width is hardcoded in drawable XML instead of being sourced from the semantic icon stroke token. LSIcon only records metrics.strokeWidth in semantics at android/app/src/main/java/com/laneshadow/ui/atoms/LSIcon.kt:48; it does not apply the token to the rendered vector. The same hardcoded pattern appears across the new icon resources, e.g. ic_compass.xml:10 and ic_compass.xml:17, and ic_sliders.xml:10/17/24 plus strokeWidth="0" fill paths. If the token changes, the rendered glyph stroke will not change, violating the no-hardcoded-stroke constraint.

diff_scope.notes: Changed files are LSIcon atom sources, drawable icons, tests, and debug AtomsStories registration. No edits to tokens or native-sandbox.

tokens.icon_size: IconSize resolves from parsed semantic.tokens.json in IconSize.kt:56-62 with no numeric runtime fallback literals in IconSize.kt.
tokens.stroke: Token value is parsed into metrics.strokeWidth, but rendered vector resources still hardcode android:strokeWidth values.

release_sandbox.evidence: com.nativesandbox dependency is debugImplementation only at android/app/build.gradle.kts:116; no com.nativesandbox references found under android/app/src/main.
release_sandbox.release_apk_inspection: not run because assembleRelease requires Gradle writes in read-only sandbox

cheap_gates.project_wide_material_icons_grep: found existing out-of-scope matches under android/app/src/main
cheap_gates.pnpm_icons_check: not completed: tsx failed to create IPC pipe with EPERM in read-only sandbox
cheap_gates.focused_gradle_test: not completed: Gradle wrapper failed to create ~/.gradle lock file in read-only sandbox

residual_risk: Project-wide Material Icons references still exist in pre-existing out-of-scope files under android/app/src/main, including IconSymbol.kt, IconSymbolIOS.kt, MapControls.kt, and others. Per instruction, these are residual risk rather than changed-file defects.
Release APK sandbox exclusion was source-inspected but not APK-verified because Gradle cannot write wrapper/build state in the read-only sandbox.
pnpm icons:check could not run in this sandbox, so catalog parity was validated with a direct read-only enum/drawable mapping script instead.
